blocks.text: Match preview: Australia Women face West Indies Women in 1st Semi-Final (T20) on Tue, 30 Jun, 2026, 7:00 pm at Kennington Oval London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Australia Women vs West Indies Women

blocks.text: Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Light drizzle · High 23°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0.6 mm · Wind: up to 15 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
